title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that enables production-grade clusters with a single click. It automates control plane and data plane management while allowing customization for advanced users and includes built-in support for AI workloads with auto-scaling via Karpenter node pools.
